-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-94r0","title":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI","description":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI.

When user is authenticated with premium account, extend search to include:
- User's own prompts (if they have any)
- User's saved prompts
- User's collections (search collection names and descriptions)
- User's prompt notes

Search Flow:
1. Search local prompt registry first (fast, always available)
2. If authenticated, concurrently search premium API endpoints
3. Merge results, marking personal prompts with [personal] tag
4. Display combined results with source indicators

CLI Options:
- jfp search <query> --mine (search only personal prompts)
- jfp search <query> --saved (search only saved prompts)
- jfp search <query> --all (search everything, default for premium users)
- jfp search <query> --local (search only local registry, default for free users)

Graceful Degradation:
- If API unavailable, fall back to local-only search with warning
- If not authenticated, only search local registry (no warning)

API integration with auth/premium checks. 248 unit tests pass. E2E tests need separate update for new JSON formats.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-94r0","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-dio8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T20:24:48.874313433-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-94r0","title":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI","description":"Add search integration for personal prompts in CLI.

When user is authenticated with premium account, extend search to include:
- User's own prompts (if they have any)
- User's saved prompts
- User's collections (search collection names and descriptions)
- User's prompt notes

Search Flow:
1. Search local prompt registry first (fast, always available)
2. If authenticated, concurrently search premium API endpoints
3. Merge results, marking personal prompts with [personal] tag
4. Display combined results with source indicators

CLI Options:
- jfp search <query> --mine (search only personal prompts)
- jfp search <query> --saved (search only saved prompts)
- jfp search <query> --all (search everything, default for premium users)
- jfp search <query> --local (search only local registry, default for free users)

Graceful Degradation:
- If API unavailable, fall back to local-only search with warning
- If not authenticated, only search local registry (no warning)

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-95wl","title":"Implement jfp collections command","description":"Add new command: jfp collections - lists user collections. jfp collections <name> shows prompts in that collection. jfp collections <name> --add <prompt-id> adds prompt to collection.
